title: Connected Doors
description: Open double doors, matching trapdoors, and paired fence gates together automatically. Simple, configurable, and works across vanilla materials.
body:
# Connected Doors Continued

Minecraft should already do this. Since it doesn’t, this mod does.

Connected Doors Continued automatically opens and closes matching adjacent doors, trapdoors, and fence gates together, so builds feel cleaner and more natural without redstone hacks.

## What it does
- Opens paired doors together
- Opens paired trapdoors together
- Opens paired fence gates together
- Works with vanilla wood types and materials
- Lets you enable or disable each behavior in config

## Why use it
- Better-looking entrances
- Cleaner building quality-of-life
- No redstone needed for basic paired interactions

## Config file
`config/connected-doors-continued.json`

## Requirements
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API
